examples: The little prince contemplated the little pauper gravely a moment, then said, "And prithee, why not?"
He did die a pauper and is buried in an unmarked grave.
Ah, yes, but could so fantastic a pauper get admission to the august presence of a monarch?
Most people accept that a dollar is worth more to a pauper than to a plutocrat.
Even if southern Dallas stays the pauper to Highland Park's prince, the Metroplex will keep on growing.
